title: Genital wart documentation

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.
investigations.rationale: Supports accurate counselling without inferring infection source or timing.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

source.title: Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 — Genital Ulcers, Anogenital Warts, and Human Papillomavirus Infections

assessment.text: Supports clinician-observed wart morphology and site, differential diagnosis, biopsy context when indicated, immune and pregnancy context, and counselling without inferring HPV type or cancer.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-observed morphology and qualified evaluation.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-observed wart morphology and site, differential diagnosis, biopsy context when indicated, immune and pregnancy context, and counselling without inferring HPV type or cancer.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Lesion morphology, site, examination, pregnancy, immune status, STI context, prior treatment and pathology are absent.
No wart, HPV type, cancer, biopsy, treatment or partner conclusion is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
